powerful_feature_1_description: Transfer money securely between accounts with online and mobile options for easy financial management.
powerful_feature_2_description: Get personal or professional loans with competitive rates and a simplified approval process.
powerful_feature_3_description: Pay your bills online instantly and securely with a wide variety of payment options.
powerful_section_description: At Eurovitas, we offer innovative and secure loan solutions that meet all your financial needs. From online application to quick approval, we simplify access to loans.
professionalLoan.title: Professional Loan
privacy_intro: At Eurovitas Finanzen, we are committed to protecting the confidentiality and security of your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our online loan services.
company_information_text: Eurovitas Finanzen is an online lending platform dedicated to providing accessible and secure financial solutions. We operate in compliance with European data protection regulations.
website_section_text: We collect certain data directly from you, such as information you enter yourself, data related to your participation in our services, and data from third-party platforms you connect.
user_data_text: We collect personal information such as your name, address, phone number, email address, financial information, and identification documents to process your loan requests.
data_collection_text: We obtain data through your direct interaction with our website, your loan requests, your communications with our customer support, and verified third-party sources to validate your identity and creditworthiness.
data_usage_text: Your data is used to process your loan requests, assess your eligibility, communicate with you, improve our services, and comply with legal and regulatory obligations.
loan_cta_desc: Complete your online application in under 10 minutes. Initial response within 24 hours, no obligation.
about_intro_desc_1: Eurovitas Finanzen is a European online lending platform committed to making financing accessible to everyone, quickly and transparently.
about_intro_desc_2: Founded by finance and technology experts, we combine banking expertise with technological innovation to offer a simple, fast and secure loan experience.
about_intro_desc_3: Our mission: to help you realize your projects by removing the traditional barriers of banking credit.
value_transparency_desc: No hidden fees, no ambiguous clauses. Every term of your loan is presented clearly before signing. You know exactly what you pay, when, and why.
value_speed_desc: Our 100% digital process allows you to get a principle answer in less than 24 hours. Funds are transferred within 48 to 72 hours after your application is approved.
value_responsibility_desc: We grant loans responsibly by carefully assessing each file. Our goal is not to sell credit but to offer the solution best suited to your real situation.
value_security_desc: Your personal and financial information is protected by bank-level encryption (SSL 256 bits). We comply with GDPR and never sell your data.
value_accessibility_desc: Employees, freelancers, students, or retirees — Eurovitas Finanzen adapts to your profile. We review each file individually, without discrimination and with care.
value_innovation_desc: Our technical team constantly improves the platform to provide the best possible experience. Intelligent scoring, intuitive interface, real-time tracking of repayments.
timeline_2019_desc: Three fintech entrepreneurs launched Eurovitas Finanzen in Paris with a clear vision: democratize access to credit in Europe through digital means. The platform processed its first 500 applications in a few months.
timeline_2020_desc: Eurovitas Finanzen obtained its credit institution license from the ACPR. Launch of the professional loan offer for freelancers and SMEs.
timeline_2021_desc: Client trust pushed us past 10,000 funded applications. Launch of the real-time client dashboard and early repayment module without penalties.
timeline_2022_desc: Services expanded to Belgium, Switzerland, and Luxembourg. Integration of proprietary AI-based scoring for fairer and faster decisions.
timeline_2024_desc: Over 50,000 clients served, 97% satisfaction rate, and an average rating of 4.8/5 on independent review platforms. Eurovitas Finanzen continues to innovate for you.
why_title: What sets us apart from traditional banks
team_desc: Our multidisciplinary team brings together experts in finance, technology, and customer relations, all driven by the same ambition: to offer you the best possible financing experience.
contact_description: Contact Eurovitas Finanzen for any inquiries
contact_heading: Please Reach Out Using the Following Methods
contact_voice_desc: Our essence lies in trust, innovation, and commitment to our clients.
contact_chat_desc: Our essence lies in trust, innovation, and commitment to our clients.
contact_call_desc: Our essence lies in trust, innovation, and commitment to our clients.
contact_form_desc: Eurovitas Finanzen is here to answer all your questions about our loan services. Contact us for personalized assistance.

loan_calculator_description: Simulate your loan in seconds with Eurovitas Finanzen calculator
loan_calculator_desc: Adjust the parameters to estimate your monthly payments instantly.

lr.meta_keywords: loan application, online loan, Eurovitas Finanzen, fast financing
lr.intro_description: Fill out the form in a few minutes. No account required. Our team reviews your file within 24 to 48 hours and contacts you directly by email.
lr.step1_desc: Enter your personal information and project details in a few minutes.
lr.step2_desc: Our team reviews your application and evaluates the conditions suited to your profile.
lr.step3_desc: After approval, funds are transferred to your account within 48 to 72 hours.
lr.form_required_note: All fields marked * are required. Your data is protected and confidential.
lr.purpose_placeholder: Briefly describe the intended use of the loan...
lr.simulation_note: Indicative simulation. Actual rate communicated after file review.
lr.submit_note: Your application will be reviewed by our team within 24-48h. You will receive a response by email.
lr.confirm_desc: Your loan application has been received. Our team will review it within 24-48 hours and contact you by email at
lr.confirm_ref_hint: Keep this number to track your application.
faq.meta_keywords: FAQ, Eurovitas Finanzen, frequently asked questions
faq.meta_description: Answers to frequently asked questions about Eurovitas Finanzen
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Explore Your Questions.
faq.q1: How does the loan process work at Eurovitas Finanzen?
faq.a1: At Eurovitas Finanzen, the loan process is simple and fast. You can apply online in minutes, provide the necessary documents, and receive an approval response within 24 hours. Once approved, funds are transferred directly to your account.
faq.q2: What are the eligibility criteria for a loan?
faq.a2: To be eligible for an Eurovitas Finanzen loan, you must be of legal age, have a stable income, and provide valid identification documents. We evaluate each application individually to ensure a fair decision.
faq.q3: How do I repay my loan?
faq.a3: Repayment is made through automatic monthly payments from your bank account. You can also make early payments without penalties. Log in to your dashboard to track your due dates.
faq.a4: Our interest rates vary depending on the type of loan and your profile. They are competitive and transparent. When you apply, we provide a personalized simulation with all the details.
faq.a5: Yes, the security of your data is our priority. We use advanced encryption technologies and comply with the strictest privacy standards to protect your personal information.
wcu.subtitle: Why Choose Us
wcu.title: Discover Why You Will Choose Us.
wcu.item1_desc: Get loan approval in hours thanks to our automated and efficient process.
wcu.item2_desc: Our intuitive platform lets you apply for a loan in a few clicks, without complications.
wcu.item3_desc: Your data is protected by advanced encryption technologies for maximum security.
wcu.item4_desc: Our team is available 24/7 to answer your questions and assist you with your applications.
sol.meta_description: Discover our financial services at Eurovitas Finanzen
sol.s1_desc: Create an Eurovitas Finanzen account and quickly access our loan and eBanking services from your client area.
sol.s2_desc: Flexible personal loans to meet your urgent needs, with a simplified procedure and fast financing.
sol.s3_desc: Credit solutions for entrepreneurs and SMEs, with personalized follow-up and adapted conditions.
sol.s4_desc: Secure and fast transfers between Eurovitas Finanzen accounts or to partner banks.
sol.s5_desc: Withdraw your funds at any time via your preferred channels, with instant confirmation.
sol.s6_desc: Access a complete dashboard, loan tracking, operations and account management 100% online.
about.meta_keywords: About Eurovitas Finanzen, our story, our values
about.meta_description: Discover Eurovitas Finanzen, our mission, our values and our team.
home.meta_keywords: Online loan, Eurovitas Finanzen, fast loan, secure loan
home.meta_description: Eurovitas Finanzen online loan platform for all your financial needs
home.feature1_desc: Open a Eurovitas Finanzen account online in minutes and access all our loan and financial management services.
home.feature3_desc: Finance your entrepreneurial projects with dedicated credit solutions for professionals.
home.feature4_desc: Perform financial transactions securely with real-time tracking and instant confirmations.
home.feature5_desc: Withdraw your funds easily through our secure channels, with fast and hassle-free withdrawal options.
home.feature6_desc: Enjoy a 100% online customer area to manage your accounts, loans and transactions with ease.
home.prets_desc: Choose the financing that suits your situation. Flexible solutions for every life project.
home.experience_desc: Eurovitas Finanzen offers personalized experiences for your loan needs, with transparent processes and solutions tailored to your financial situation.
home.cta_title: Free up your time to focus on other important projects.
home.cta_desc: Join us today and discover the power of online loans!
loan.personal.meta_keywords: personal loan, personal credit, personal financing, Eurovitas Finanzen
loan.personal.meta_description: Finance your personal projects with the Eurovitas Finanzen personal loan. Response in 24h, competitive rates, without proof of use.
loan.personal.subtitle: Flexible Financing
loan.personal.title: Personal Loan
loan.personal.desc1: The Eurovitas Finanzen personal loan is the ideal solution to finance all your projects without having to justify the use of funds. Travel, renovation, wedding, home appliances or unexpected expense — you have free use of the funds paid into your account.
loan.personal.desc2: With a fully online process and a response in principle within 24 hours, we guarantee you a fast, transparent and stress-free experience. Our advisors are available 7 days a week to help you choose the amount and duration best suited to your budget.
loan.personal.desc3: No hidden application fees. No penalty for early repayment. This is the loan designed for your freedom.
loan.personal.feature1_desc: No restriction on the use of funds. You use your loan as you see fit, without having to provide proof.
loan.personal.feature2_desc: Thanks to our digital scoring system, your file is analyzed in real time and you get a response in principle within 24 business hours.
loan.personal.feature3_desc: Your rate is fixed from signing and will never change. You know exactly the amount of each monthly payment until the last repayment.
loan.personal.feature4_desc: ID card, proof of income and bank details — that's all we need. No unnecessary paperwork, no agency visits.
loan.personal.feature5_desc: You can repay your loan early at any time, partially or in full, without any penalty or additional fees.
loan.personal.feature6_desc: Our advisors are available every day to answer your questions, help you prepare your file or adjust your repayment plan.
loan.auto.meta_keywords: auto loan, car credit, vehicle financing, car purchase, Eurovitas Finanzen
loan.auto.meta_description: Finance your new or used vehicle with the Eurovitas Finanzen auto loan. Competitive rates, no mandatory down payment, response in 24h.
loan.auto.subtitle: Take the wheel
loan.auto.title: Auto Loan
loan.auto.desc1: New car, used vehicle, two-wheeler or utility vehicle — the Eurovitas Finanzen auto loan finances the purchase of your vehicle whatever its nature. We offer you fast financing, without mandatory down payment, with among the most competitive rates on the market.
loan.auto.desc2: Unlike leasing or LOA, our classic auto loan makes you immediately the owner of your vehicle. You negotiate your purchase as if you were paying cash — which often allows you to get an additional discount from the dealer.
loan.auto.desc3: Electric, hybrid or thermal vehicle, from an individual or a professional: our auto loan adapts to all situations, including purchases abroad in the European space.
loan.auto.feature1_desc: Finance your new car at any approved dealership in Europe. Become an immediate owner and enjoy all manufacturer warranties.
loan.auto.feature2_desc: Purchase from a professional or individual, vehicle up to 10 years and 150,000 km — we finance your used car under the best conditions.
loan.auto.feature3_desc: Benefit from our preferential conditions for the purchase of a 100% electric or rechargeable hybrid vehicle, cumulative with government aid.
loan.auto.feature4_desc: Van, truck, construction utility — our professional auto loan finances your work vehicles with tax-deductible monthly payments.
loan.auto.feature5_desc: You don't have a down payment? No problem. We finance up to 100% of your vehicle amount according to your profile and repayment capacity.
loan.auto.feature6_desc: Response in 24 hours and funds released within 48 to 72 hours. Drive your new vehicle without waiting.
loan.real_estate.meta_keywords: real estate loan, mortgage credit, apartment purchase, home financing, Eurovitas Finanzen
loan.real_estate.meta_description: Realize your real estate project with Eurovitas Finanzen. Competitive mortgage loan, personalized support, quick response for your purchase or renovation.
loan.real_estate.subtitle: Your assets, our priority
loan.real_estate.title: Real Estate Loan
loan.real_estate.desc1: Acquiring a property is often the project of a lifetime. The Eurovitas Finanzen real estate loan supports you every step of the way: from finding optimal financing to signing at the notary, with transparent conditions and personalized support.
loan.real_estate.desc2: Whether you want to buy your main residence, a second home, a rental property or finance renovation work, we study your file globally to offer you the solution best suited to your asset situation.
loan.real_estate.desc3: Fixed or variable rates, modifiable monthly payments, competitive borrower insurance — our team of specialists guides you to the most advantageous financial arrangement.
loan.real_estate.feature1_desc: Finance the purchase of your main house or apartment with a real estate loan under the best conditions, including the possibility of a complementary zero-interest loan.
loan.real_estate.feature2_desc: Develop your real estate assets thanks to our dedicated financing for rental investment. We optimize your arrangement to maximize your return.
loan.real_estate.feature3_desc: Energy renovation, extension, layout — financing your work with a real estate loan allows you to benefit from more advantageous rates than a personal loan.
loan.real_estate.feature4_desc: You already have a high-rate mortgage? We can buy it back and offer you a more competitive rate, thus reducing your monthly payments.
loan.real_estate.feature5_desc: Our borrower insurance contracts are negotiated to offer you optimal coverage (death, disability, job loss) at the best market rate.
loan.professional.meta_keywords: professional loan, business credit, SME financing, self-employed loan, Eurovitas Finanzen
loan.professional.meta_description: Finance the development of your professional activity with Eurovitas Finanzen. Professional loan adapted to VSEs, self-employed and micro-entrepreneurs.
loan.professional.subtitle: Develop your business
loan.professional.title: Professional Loan
loan.professional.desc1: Whether you are a micro-entrepreneur, craftsman, trader, liberal professional or manager of VSE/SME, the Eurovitas Finanzen professional loan is designed to support all stages of your company's life: creation, development, equipment acquisition or cash reinforcement.
loan.professional.desc2: We understand that access to professional financing is often an obstacle course for small structures. That's why we have simplified our application process and adapted our eligibility criteria to the reality of today's entrepreneurs.
loan.professional.desc3: With Eurovitas Finanzen, your business project benefits from personalized analysis, a dedicated advisor and a quick response — because professional opportunities don't wait.
loan.professional.feature1_desc: Start your activity with peace of mind: we finance your initial working capital, your first equipment and your startup costs for the first 12 months.
loan.professional.feature2_desc: Recruitment, prospecting, opening a new agency, developing an e-commerce site — finance your growth without diluting your capital.
loan.professional.feature3_desc: Machines, tools, IT, business software, professional vehicles — amortize your investments over the real lifespan of your equipment.
loan.professional.feature4_desc: Manage your cash flow gaps, working capital requirement financing, advance on customer orders or seasonality management.
loan.professional.feature5_desc: Takeover of a company, purchase of a business or buyout of shares: we structure the financing adapted to your operation.
loan.school.meta_keywords: school loan, student credit, education financing, Eurovitas Finanzen scholarship
loan.school.meta_description: Finance your studies or those of your children with the Eurovitas Finanzen school loan. Preferential rates, deferred repayment, quick response.
loan.school.subtitle: Investing in the future
loan.school.title: School Loan
loan.school.desc1: Education is the best investment you can make. The Eurovitas Finanzen school loan is designed to finance tuition fees, student housing, educational materials, professional training or studies abroad — for you or for your children.
loan.school.desc2: We offer conditions specially adapted to students and families: preferential rates, possibility of deferring the start of repayments until the end of studies, and reduced monthly payments during the training period.
loan.school.desc3: Because no educational project should be compromised by lack of financing, Eurovitas Finanzen commits to your side from the first class to obtaining your degree.
loan.school.feature1_desc: Universities, grandes écoles, BTS, private high schools, professional training or certifications: all approved institutions are eligible.
loan.school.feature2_desc: Deposit, first rent, university residence or shared accommodation — we finance your installation so you can focus on your studies.
loan.school.feature3_desc: Erasmus, international semester, dual degree: our loans cover registration, visa, transport and living expenses abroad.
loan.school.feature4_desc: Computer, software, books, professional supplies — everything necessary for your academic success can be financed.
loan.school.feature5_desc: Start repaying only at the end of your studies. During your training, you only pay interest, or even nothing at all depending on your file.
loan.agricultural.meta_keywords: agricultural loan, farmer credit, farm financing, Eurovitas Finanzen
loan.agricultural.meta_description: Finance your agricultural operation with the Eurovitas Finanzen agricultural loan. Conditions adapted to seasonal cycles, high amounts, competitive rates.
loan.agricultural.subtitle: Supporting agriculture
loan.agricultural.title: Agricultural Loan
loan.agricultural.desc1: Agriculture is a business sector with unique financial constraints: seasonality of income, needs for heavy equipment, climate hazards and delays between investment and harvest. The Eurovitas Finanzen agricultural loan was specifically designed to meet these field realities.
loan.agricultural.desc2: Whether you are a farmer, market gardener, breeder, winegrower or in the process of setting up, our offer adapts to your activity cycle. We offer repayments aligned with your cash inflows and sufficient amounts to cover structuring investments.
loan.agricultural.desc3: Our specialized account managers understand the challenges of the agricultural world and support you with a human and pragmatic approach, far from the rigid models of traditional banks.
loan.agricultural.feature1_desc: Tractors, harvesters, seeders, irrigation, greenhouses — finance your agricultural equipment with repayments adapted to your production cycle.
loan.agricultural.feature2_desc: Acquisition of agricultural plots, expansion of operation or takeover of a farm: we finance your land project under advantageous conditions.
loan.agricultural.feature3_desc: Construction or renovation of barns, silos, stables, wine cellars — all your agricultural buildings can benefit from tailor-made financing.
loan.agricultural.feature4_desc: Anticipate your needs for seeds, fertilizers, phytosanitary products and inputs before the season, without weighing on your current cash flow.
loan.agricultural.feature5_desc: Solar panels, methanization, organic farming, rational irrigation — we support your transition to sustainable agriculture.
loan.emergency.meta_keywords: emergency loan, quick credit, urgent financing, express loan Eurovitas Finanzen
loan.emergency.meta_description: Need urgent financing? Eurovitas Finanzen emergency loan, response in 1 hour, funds released in 24h, no complications.
loan.emergency.subtitle: When urgency matters
loan.emergency.title: Emergency Loan
loan.emergency.desc1: An unexpected expense? A last-minute opportunity? A cash flow gap? The Eurovitas Finanzen emergency loan is designed for situations where every hour counts. We guarantee an ultra-fast process without compromising the quality of our service.
loan.emergency.desc2: Unlike traditional loans that require weeks of processing, our emergency loan uses a simplified digital procedure. Your application is analyzed instantly by our automated scoring system, with a human advisor always available to support you.
loan.emergency.desc3: Transparent rates, no hidden fees, flexible repayment terms — even in emergencies, Eurovitas Finanzen maintains its commitment to responsible and fair financing.
loan.emergency.feature1_desc: Receive a response in principle within 60 minutes of submitting your complete file. No endless waiting, no uncertainty.
loan.emergency.feature2_desc: Once accepted, funds are transferred to your account within 24 hours. For true emergencies, express transfer is available.
loan.emergency.feature3_desc: Minimum documents, fully online process, no agency visits. We know that in an emergency, every minute counts.
loan.emergency.feature4_desc: From 500€ to 15,000€, adapt the amount to your real need without being forced to borrow more than necessary.
loan.emergency.feature5_desc: Repay your emergency loan as soon as you have the funds, without any penalty. Total flexibility to manage your finances.

terms_meta_description: Eurovitas Finanzen Terms and Conditions of Use
terms_intro_text: These Terms and Conditions govern your use of our Eurovitas Finanzen platform. By using this site, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
terms_intellectual_property_text: Except for content you own, under these Terms, Eurovitas Finanzen and/or its licensors own all intellectual property rights and materials contained on this site.
terms_restrictions_text: You are specifically restricted from all of the following:
terms_restrictions_item1: Publish any website material on any other media
terms_restrictions_item2: Sell, sublicense and/or otherwise commercialize any website material
terms_restrictions_item3: Use this site in any way that may be harmful to this site
terms_no_warranty_text: This site is provided "as is," with all faults, and Eurovitas Finanzen makes no express or implied representations or warranties of any kind with respect to this site or the materials contained on this site.
terms_limitation_text: In no event shall Eurovitas Finanzen, nor any of its officers, directors and employees, be liable for anything arising from or in any way connected with your use of this site.
terms_governing_law_text: These Terms shall be governed and interpreted in accordance with the laws of France, and you submit to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts.
cookies_meta_keywords: cookies, cookie policy, trackers, Eurovitas Finanzen
cookies_meta_description: Eurovitas Finanzen cookie policy: what cookies we use, why and how to manage them.
cookies_section1_text: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember information about your visit, such as your preferred language and other settings, to facilitate your navigation during future visits.
cookies_section2_1_text: These cookies are essential for the website to function. They allow you to use the main features (secure session, authentication, forms). Without these cookies, some parts of the site cannot function properly. These cookies cannot be disabled.
cookies_section2_2_text: These cookies allow us to measure the site's audience and analyze visitor behavior for continuous improvement purposes. The collected data is anonymized. We use Google Analytics 4 for this purpose, in accordance with CNIL recommendations.
cookies_section2_3_text: These cookies allow us to remember your preferences (language, dark/light mode, currency) to personalize your experience. They do not track any personally identifiable information.
cookies_section2_4_text: These cookies are used to show you relevant advertisements on other websites. They are only placed with your explicit consent. You can withdraw this consent at any time.
cookies_session_cookies: Session cookies: deleted when browser is closed
cookies_persistent_cookies: Persistent cookies: retained for maximum 13 months according to CNIL recommendations
cookies_analytics_cookies: Analytics cookies: anonymized data retained for maximum 25 months
cookies_section4_text: On your first visit to our site, a banner informs you about the presence of cookies and asks for your consent for non-essential cookies. You can modify your preferences at any time by clicking "Manage cookies" at the bottom of the page, or by configuring your browser:
cookies_section5_text: Some of our partners may place cookies on your device when you visit our site. These cookies are subject to these third parties' privacy policies: Google (Analytics, reCAPTCHA), Stripe (secure payment), Intercom (chat support). We have no control over these third-party cookies.
cookies_section6_text: For any questions about our cookie policy, contact our Data Protection Officer: admin@eurovitas.de
gdpr_meta_keywords: GDPR, data protection, DPO, Eurovitas Finanzen, privacy
gdpr_meta_description: Eurovitas Finanzen personal data protection policy compliant with GDPR. Your rights, our commitments, how we protect your data.
gdpr_intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU Regulation 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act No. 78-17 of January 6, 1978, as amended, Eurovitas Finanzen SAS is committed to protecting your personal data.
gdpr_section1_text:
Eurovitas Finanzen SAS — 14 Rue de la Paix, 75002 Paris
Data Protection Officer (DPO): admin@eurovitas.de
gdpr_section2_text: As part of our online lending services, we collect the following data:
gdpr_identity_data: Identity data: name, first name, date of birth, nationality, ID document
gdpr_contact_data: Contact data: email address, phone number, postal address
gdpr_financial_data: Financial data: income, expenses, bank statements, IBAN
gdpr_connection_data: Connection data: IP address, browsing data, connection logs
gdpr_behavioral_data: Behavioral data: pages visited, session duration (anonymized)
gdpr_contractual_purpose: Contractual necessity: processing your loan application, managing your account, tracking your repayments
gdpr_legal_purpose: Legal obligation: anti-money laundering (AML/CFT), ACPR regulatory compliance, tax declarations
gdpr_legitimate_purpose: Legitimate interest: fraud prevention, service improvement, cybersecurity
gdpr_consent_purpose: Consent: sending marketing communications, non-essential cookies (withdrawable at any time)
gdpr_contractual_data: Contractual data: 5 years after end of loan contract
gdpr_aml_data: AML/CFT data: 5 years after end of business relationship
gdpr_prospect_data: Prospect data: 3 years after last contact
gdpr_section5_text: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
gdpr_right_access: Right of access (art. 15): obtain a copy of your data
gdpr_right_rectification: Right to rectification (art. 16): correct inaccurate data
gdpr_right_erasure: Right to erasure (art. 17): delete your data under certain conditions
gdpr_right_portability: Right to data portability (art. 20): receive your data in a structured format
gdpr_right_objection: Right to object (art. 21): object to processing for marketing purposes
gdpr_right_restriction: Right to restriction (art. 18): temporarily restrict processing
gdpr_rights_exercise: To exercise your rights: admin@eurovitas.de or by mail to our DPO, 14 Rue de la Paix, 75002 Paris. Response guaranteed within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL: www.cnil.fr
gdpr_section6_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures: 256-bit SSL encryption, pseudonymization, strict access control, regular security audits, ISO 27001 certified hosting. In case of data breach, you will be notified within 72 hours if this poses a high risk to your rights.
gdpr_section7_text: Your data is hosted within the European Union. Any transfer to a third country only occurs with appropriate safeguards (European Commission standard contractual clauses) and is documented in our processing register.
